title: Oru Kuchi Oru Kulfi Lyrics Kalakalappu 2
stanzas:
oru kuchi oru gulfi
vandhu ninnu edu selfi.

unkoodathaan photo pudichen
touchu phonula
touchu panni ichu koduppen
honey moon-ula.

thalli thalli pogaathamma
nillu nillu
namma kalyanatha enga
vachikalaam sollu sollu

vandhaa maha lakshmiye
nee vandhathaala overnightula
naanum rajiniye.

yaaru yaaru annaatha
yaaru yaaru
anna nada akkavukku
super star-u.

straighta una paathaa
nee irukura quieta
white-a tubelighta
ne jolikkura brighta

siza chinna vayasa
unna paathen nice-a
ye pala palanu minukuriye
plastic rice-a

karanja kuchi ice-a
kulukkal bumper price-a
biriyani nee irukka
edhukudi pizza

pakkathula ne irunthu
paathukadi maman dhillathaan
megamallu katti vachen
manasukullathaan.

jingiliyaa jinukaa
dhevathaya kanakkaa
nammala pola kappalu
ooril irukkaa
indha ooril irukkaa
namma ooril irukkaa
indha ooril irukkaa

oru kuchi oru gulfi
vandhu ninnu edu selfi.

unkoodathaan photo pudichen
touchu phonula
touchu panni ichu koduppen
honey moon-ula.

thalli thalli pogaathamma
nillu nillu
namma kalyanatha enga

vandhaa maha lakshmiye
nee vandhathaala overnightula

seo.title: Oru Kuchi Oru Kulfi Lyrics Kalakalappu 2

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Oru Kuchi Oru Kulfi celebrates love and the joy of capturing moments, particularly in a wedding context.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

The song is featured during a lively wedding scene in Kalakalappu 2, enhancing the festive atmosphere.

Who are the singers and music director?

The song is sung by Gana Vinoth and Saravedi Saran, with music composed by Hip Hop Tamizha.

When was the song released?

Oru Kuchi Oru Kulfi was released on March 19, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Kuchi Oru Kulfi, the lively beats and playful lyrics create an atmosphere of celebration, making it a perfect fit for wedding festivities in Kalakalappu 2. The song conveys a sense of joy and excitement, inviting listeners to join in the fun. With its catchy tune and energetic performances, it evokes feelings of happiness and togetherness. This track is not just a song; it's an anthem for joyous moments shared with loved ones.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Kuchi Oru Kulfi from Kalakalappu 2 is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, perfectly encapsulating the spirit of a wedding party. With the infectious energy of Gana Vinoth and Saravedi Saran, this track is sure to get everyone on their feet. Hip Hop Tamizha's catchy beats make this song a must-listen for any festive occasion!
stanzaMeanings: A little ice cream has come, let's take a selfie.
I liked your photo, I'll touch it and send it to you on the phone during our honeymoon.
Don't push me away, stay here, we can plan our wedding.
You came like a goddess, because of you, I feel like a star overnight.
Who is the elder brother? Who is the elder brother? The superstar of the place.
When I see you, you are like a quiet white tube light, shining bright.
I saw you at a young age, you look nice, like plastic rice.
A little ice cream is a big deal, why have biryani when you can have pizza?
From nearby, I see you, I have built a cloud in my heart.
Jingiliyaa, jinukaa, is there a god like us in this town?
